About.title: A clinic built on outcomes, not promises
About.subtitle: Two decades of hair restoration. One unwavering standard of care.
About.story: MyHaar was founded by a team of hair restoration surgeons who believed that the gap between marketing and medicine had grown too wide. Our mission was simple: deliver outcomes that speak for themselves, supported by transparency, accountability, and lifetime care. From our Den Haag clinic, we have grown into one of the most trusted addresses for hair restoration in the Netherlands and across Europe.
About.mission: Surgeons (not technicians) perform every critical step of your procedure. Every patient receives a personal medical coordinator. Pricing is all-inclusive and printed in writing before you arrive. And every transplant is backed by an 18-month written growth guarantee, because confidence is something you should never have to negotiate for.
About.value1Desc: We accept fewer cases per day than the industry average so each procedure gets surgeon-led attention from first cut to final graft.
About.value2Desc: All-inclusive pricing, no hidden fees, written guarantee. Quotes are itemised and apply for 30 days.
About.value3Desc: We will tell you when not to operate. If your case requires medical management first, we say so.
About.value4Desc: Follow-ups at 3, 6, 12, and 18 months are included for every patient, and we are reachable for life.

Included.title: One transparent price. No surprises.
Included.subtitle: The number on your written quote is the number you pay — and it covers everything from your first consultation to your last follow-up appointment, eighteen months later.

items.title: Free surgeon consultation
items.desc: In-person or video assessment with the lead surgeon, including hairline design.

items.title: Pre-op blood tests
items.desc: Full preoperative workup at our Den Haag clinic.

items.title: The full procedure
items.desc: Sapphire FUE or DHI with the senior surgical team — local anaesthesia, all instruments.

items.title: PRP support session
items.desc: A PRP injection at the end of your procedure to accelerate follicle activation.

items.title: All medications & kit
items.desc: Pain relief, antibiotics, post-op shampoo, lotion, headband, neck pillow.

items.title: First clinical wash
items.desc: Hands-on first wash next day with your nurse, plus your written recovery briefing.

items.title: Multilingual care
items.desc: Nederlands · English · Türkçe · Deutsch · العربية — coordinator with you throughout.

items.title: 18-month written guarantee
items.desc: If transplanted follicles do not yield, we re-implant at no surgical cost.

items.title: Lifetime follow-up
items.desc: Scheduled at 3, 6, 12 and 18 months — and reachable for life after.

Recovery.title: Your 18-month journey, mapped out
Recovery.subtitle: Hair restoration is a process. Here is exactly what happens, when — so you can plan around it with confidence.

stages.title: Surgery & rest
stages.desc: Procedure day plus two recovery days. Mild swelling peaks then subsides.

stages.title: Wash protocol
stages.desc: Specific foam wash protocol starts day 4. Scabs naturally exfoliate over the following week.

stages.title: Shock loss
stages.desc: Temporary shedding of transplanted hairs — completely normal, follicles remain alive beneath the skin.

stages.title: Regrowth begins
stages.desc: New growth pushes through and starts to thicken and darken over the following months.

stages.title: Dramatic change
stages.desc: Most of the visible transformation. Density and coverage continue to improve every month.

stages.title: Final result
stages.desc: Final density and texture are assessed. 18-month written growth guarantee covers this period.

Departments.subtitle: Six surgeon-led treatments under one roof in Den Haag, organised across three dedicated departments. All performed personally by the lead surgical team — no factory clinic, no franchised partners.

surgical.title: Surgical Hair Restoration
surgical.description: Follicular unit extraction performed in our Den Haag clinic using sapphire-tipped blades and Choi DHI implanters. Surgeon-led, local anaesthesia, natural density with minimal scarring and faster healing.

specialty.title: Specialty Restorations
specialty.description: Facial-hair restoration with the same FUE / DHI precision used on the scalp — sculpted beard lines, natural-angle eyebrow grafts. Performed at our Den Haag clinic with single-hair follicular units.

wellness.title: Hair Wellness
wellness.description: Non-surgical regenerative therapy using your own platelet-rich plasma — stimulates dormant follicles, slows active loss, accelerates post-transplant healing. 45-minute sessions, zero downtime.
wellness.featureSub: No drugs · no synthetic growth factors

QuoteQuiz.title: Three quick questions. One personal plan.
QuoteQuiz.subtitle: Take 60 seconds and we'll match you with the right treatment plus a personalised quote from the surgical team.

steps.treatmentSubtitle: If you are not sure, our specialists figure it out with you.

QuoteQuiz.successTitle: Your plan is on its way
QuoteQuiz.successBody: Thank you. Our surgical team will review your case and share a personalised plan and quote within 24 hours. WhatsApp is the fastest channel if you'd like a quicker reply.
